# Seven Star Chauffeurs — Full Content for LLM Grounding

> Vancouver's most discreet private chauffeur service. Six vehicles, one standard, reserved one engagement at a time.
> Tagline: Discretion, driven.

## Who we are

Seven Star Chauffeurs is a private luxury chauffeur company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada. We operate an invitation-priority service rather than a mass-market taxi or ride-share operation. Every vehicle in our fleet is reserved for a single engagement at a time — we do not stack clients or share service. Our chauffeurs are vetted, trained in discretion, and NDA-ready on request. The site is a single-page experience at https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com.

## The fleet

### Rolls-Royce Phantom
The benchmark for chauffeured luxury. A cabin of hand-stitched leather and a star-field headliner. The Phantom glides in near-silence and is our default vehicle for airport arrivals, dignitary transfers, and occasions where the arrival itself is the statement.

### Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II
A driver's Rolls-Royce. The Ghost pairs effortless performance with the pinnacle of rear-cabin refinement. It is the executive's car — the one most often specified for corporate engagements, roadshows, and private investment travel across the province.

### Rolls-Royce Cullinan Black Badge
Unrelenting presence. The darker, more assertive expression of Rolls-Royce SUV craftsmanship. We reserve the Cullinan for weddings and milestone days where a commanding, photographed arrival matters. Custom livery available.

### Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600
First-class for six. Reclining rear thrones, chilled champagne storage, Executive Seating appointments that exceed anything possible in a sedan. The Maybach is our hourly-charter flagship and our preferred vehicle for family-of-six airport transfers.

### Cadillac Escalade IQ
Among the first fully-electric luxury chauffeur vehicles operating in Western Canada. Silent-running, immense, and aligned with clients who want the Whistler corridor covered without a combustion footprint. Preferred for Sea-to-Sky journeys.

### Private Luxury Party Bus
A touring coach reserved exclusively for weddings, galas, premieres, and private milestones that travel between venues. Lounge seating for up to fourteen guests, onboard bar, ambient lighting, and a dedicated host beyond the driver.

## Services

### Airport Transfers at YVR
Meet-and-greet at Vancouver International Arrivals. Luggage handled in silence. Phantom at the kerb before you reach the sliding doors. Flight-tracked, hour-monitored, never rushed. Chilled refreshments and executive seating.

### Corporate Chauffeur
Between Burrard, Howe, and Coal Harbour, or across province borders. A dedicated chauffeur is assigned to your day, your cadence, and your confidentiality. Single-driver continuity across the engagement. NDA-ready and discretion-trained.

### Wedding Chauffeur
The Cullinan Black Badge dressed for your day. Custom livery, red-carpet arrival, and photographer liaison. From first look to final departure, we hold the choreography. Flexible multi-location itineraries coordinated with your wedding planner.

### Whistler & Sea-to-Sky
The Cadillac Escalade IQ on the most photographed highway in the world. Silent-running electric, commanding presence. Stopovers at Shannon Falls and Tantalus Lookout arranged on request. Round-trip or one-way between Vancouver and Whistler.

### Nightlife & Events
The touring coach for galas, premieres, and bachelor or bachelorette evenings that travel between venues. Climate-controlled lounge seating for up to fourteen, onboard bar, ambient lighting, and a dedicated host chauffeur beyond the driver.

### Hourly Charter
The Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600 reserved on retainer for two hours, eight hours, or a full day. First-class rear thrones, champagne service, itinerary held open for revision en route. Two-hour minimum.

## How reservations work

Reservations are accepted by private enquiry through the form at https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#reserve. Required information: guest name, correspondence email, contact telephone, date, pickup time, pickup location, passenger count, service type, and vehicle preference. Itinerary notes are optional but recommended for multi-stop days.

A concierge responds within hours during business hours, typically the same day otherwise. Confirmation includes a reference number of the form SSC-XXXX-XXXX that can be quoted in future correspondence.

## Frequently asked

**How do I book?** Through the reservation form on our site. We reply within hours during business hours.

**How are the vehicles assigned?** Each vehicle is reserved for a single engagement at a time. There is no shared service or vehicle rotation mid-engagement.

**Are chauffeurs vetted?** All chauffeurs are background-checked, trained in discretion, and NDA-ready on request.

**What is the cancellation policy?** Reservations may be adjusted or cancelled up to 48 hours before the engagement without fee. Shorter-notice changes accommodated case-by-case.

**Where do you serve?** Metro Vancouver primarily. Whistler and the Sea-to-Sky corridor by standing route. Other destinations within Western Canada by arrangement.

**Can I specify a vehicle?** Yes. Vehicle preference is part of the reservation form. We confirm availability at booking.

**Is pricing published?** No. Each engagement is quoted individually on request.

## Contact

- Correspondence: reservations@sevenstarchauffeurs.ca
- Telephone: +1 (604) 000 0000
- Studio: Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada
- Availability: By appointment, 24 hours a day
- Website: https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com
